calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
9:40am
Cause called for Small claims appeal. Respondent, Baby Vargas aka Lucy V. Moya, appears in Pro Per. There is no appearance by Appellant Charita B. Repollo. Appearing as Tagalog interpreter for Ms. Vargas is Jonas Sangalang. Ms. Vargas and Mr. Sangalang are sworn as witnesses.
Ms. Vargas, with the assistance of Mr. Sangalong, presents her case in the narrative.
Judge Myles has questions for Ms. Vargas.
9:52am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or admitted. Defendant's evidence from the Small Claims appeal remains in the file.
